features.name: part-select extraction from concatenation result
features.description: Code should include a part-select (bit extraction) applied to the result of a concatenation, where all extracted bits originate from a single concatenated operand, creating a redundant intermediate extraction

features.name: zero-extension concatenation with low-bit part-select
features.description: Code should include a zero-extension concatenation of the form {1'b0, src[N-1:0]} followed by a part-select that extracts only bits within the src operand range, producing a redundant intermediate wire

features.name: ternary chain using individual bits of concatenation result
features.description: Code should include a cascaded ternary conditional expression that selects values based on individual bit positions of a concatenation result, where each condition tests a single bit extracted from the concat

features.name: redundant intermediate wire for part-select of input bus
features.description: Code should include an intermediate wire declaration that is solely a part-select of a module input bus, followed by use of that wire in further expressions, producing a pattern that can be simplified by direct substitution
